features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
It’s time to put your skin in the spotlight! - Energise your skin with our Face Facts Collagen & Q10 Facial Serum, it helps improve skin elasticity and smooth your skin.
Hero here is ubiquinone (Q10) an awesome antioxidant - Its known to temporarily reduce the appearance of fine lines
Really lightweight formula - Making it easy to use pm or am (just remember your SPF on top for the day).
Boosted with Collagen, Glycerin & Betaine - That all help make your skin soft, smooth and lovely.
AM or PM - Use before applying makeup in the morning for that natural radiance, or before bed for overnight restoration.
description: Product Description Energise your skin with this facial serum, it helps improve skin elasticity and smooth your skin. The hero here is ubiquinone (Q10) an awesome antioxidant as its known to temporarily reduce the appearance of fine lines. With nice ingredients like collagen that make your skin soft, smooth and lovely. Ingredients Aqua, Glycerin, DMDM Hydantoin, Polyacrylic Acid, Triethanolamine, Betaine, Parfum, Disodium EDTA, Hydrolyzed Collagen, C12-15 Alkyl Benzoate, Tocopheryl Acetate, PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Ubiquinone, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Cinnamyl Alcohol, Geraniol, Hexyl Cinnamal, Linalool. Directions Can be used either morning or evening. In the morning, apply a few drops of the serum directly on to the face before applying makeup. Gently massage in to the skin until fully absorbed. In the evening, apply a few drops of the serum directly on to cleansed, dry skin. Gently massage in to the skin until fully absorbed and leave on overnight. Use daily, alongside the Face Facts Collagen & Q10 collection to complete your skincare routine. See more
